finding: The cross-file guard treated pre-existing, unmodified handoff imports in a staged validator file as a dependency on another task's uncommitted handoff changes and blocked the commit.
expectedBehavior: Only imports added or changed by the staged patch may require the dependency to land in the same commit; untouched import contracts must not couple tasks.
evidenceOrRepro: TASK-TEAM-0079's queue-only validator staging was blocked because `scripts/validate-team-agents.ts` already imported handoff-ledger symbols owned by in-flight TASK-TEAM-0075.
followUp: Retain the tightened staged-patch import-drift detection plus a regression for the legitimate new-import case that must still fail closed.
